prompt: I'm digging into my 2022–23 food & drink log to see how beer orders compare on wednesdays versus saturdays. Round dollar amounts to two decimals and percentages to one decimal. What are the average total prices per entry on each day, and how big is the percent jump on saturday overall? I'm also curious about gender differences in spending patterns - break out that same percent change for women and men, and tell me which gender shows the larger saturday vs. wednesday gap.
